hooks.command: TODAY=$(date "+%A, %B %d, %Y"); ISO=$(date "+%Y-%m-%d"); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"SESSION-START BRIEFING (deliver before responding to anything else; begin the reply with the word Samarth per CLAUDE.md): (1) Tell Samarth today is %s. (2) Read @notes/REVIEW.md and list every row whose Review Date is on or before %s as the items DUE THIS SESSION (problem name, tag, days overdue); if none are due, say reviews are clear. (3) Surface the next unsolved problem from the CURRENT POSITION block in @plans/PLAN.md. Keep it a tight briefing, then wait."}}' "$TODAY" "$ISO"
